sql.query: SELECT ev.value AS account_no, ev.c_elementvalue_id AS account_id, ev.name AS account_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fa.dateacct < '__DATEFROM__'::date THEN fa.amtacctdr - fa.amtacctcr ELSE 0 END), 0) AS opening_balance, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fa.dateacct >= '__DATEFROM__'::date AND fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date THEN fa.amtacctdr ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activity_debit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fa.dateacct >= '__DATEFROM__'::date AND fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date THEN fa.amtacctcr ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activity_credit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date THEN fa.amtacctdr - fa.amtacctcr ELSE 0 END), 0) AS closing_balance FROM fact_acct fa JOIN c_elementvalue ev ON ev.c_elementvalue_id = fa.account_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND fa.factaccttype NOT IN ('R', 'C') AND fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date AND ('__ORGID__' = '' OR fa.ad_org_id = '__ORGID__') AND ('__ACCTSCHEMAID__' = '' OR fa.c_acctschema_id = '__ACCTSCHEMAID__') AND ('__BPARTNERID__' = '' OR fa.c_bpartner_id = '__BPARTNERID__') AND ('__PRODUCTID__' = '' OR fa.m_product_id = '__PRODUCTID__') AND ('__PROJECTID__' = '' OR fa.c_project_id = '__PROJECTID__') AND ('__FROMACCOUNTID__' = '' OR ev.value >= '__FROMACCOUNTID__') AND ('__TOACCOUNTID__' = '' OR ev.value <= '__TOACCOUNTID__') GROUP BY ev.value, ev.c_elementvalue_id, ev.name HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN fa.dateacct >= '__DATEFROM__'::date AND fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date THEN ABS(fa.amtacctdr) + ABS(fa.amtacctcr) ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY ev.value
